base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hud_stage_flag_emblem_nes — a ui from 1981 galaga. Stage-flag emblems — 1/5/10/20/30/50 values shown at bottom-right. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Stage-flag emblems — 1/5/10/20/30/50 values shown at bottom-right; NES palette
